hero.title: Verifiable Participant Points
hero.subtitle: Earn tamper-proof points for survey participation — secured by blockchain technology.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.description: All points are recorded on the blockchain — publicly verifiable and tamper-proof.

noExtensions.title: No Extensions
noExtensions.description: No MetaMask or browser extensions needed. Everything works right in your browser.

costEfficient.title: Cost Efficient
costEfficient.description: Built on Base L2 — each transaction costs less than $0.01.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully open source. Any university can deploy their own instance.

wallet.title: Wallet
wallet.noWallet: You don't have a wallet yet.

create.title: Create Wallet
create.description: Generate a new wallet directly in your browser. No registration needed.

import.title: Import Wallet
import.description: Import an existing wallet using your private key.

info.warning: Never share your private key with anyone. Store it securely!

delete.title: Delete Wallet
delete.description: This will remove the wallet from your browser. Make sure you have backed up your private key!

claim.title: Claim Points
claim.noWallet: You need a wallet to claim points.

error.missingParams: Missing survey ID or secret in the URL.
error.alreadyClaimed: You have already claimed points for this survey.
error.invalidSecret: Invalid secret. The claim link may be corrupted.
error.surveyInactive: This survey is no longer active.
error.generic: Failed to claim points. Please try again.

points.title: My Points
points.noWallet: Connect a wallet to view your points.
points.empty: No points yet. Complete a survey to earn your first points!

explorer.title: Explorer
explorer.description: Look up points for any wallet address.
explorer.invalidAddress: Please enter a valid wallet address.

auth.title: Admin Authentication
auth.description: Sign a message with your admin wallet to access the dashboard.
